---
title: "Data Visualization"
image: stlaw.png
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/boden-driscoll/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/BodenDriscoll
---

Blog posts of my Data Visualization class
